name: oneiro-oca
description: Oneiro Cognitive Architecture — embodied machine cognition on consumer hardware

scripts.migrate: set -e; DB=postgres://quinnodonnell@localhost/oneiro; CORE_READY=$(psql "$DB" -tAc "SELECT CASE WHEN to_regclass('public.cognitive_events') IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END"); for f in migrations/*.sql; do if [ "$(basename "$f" | cut -d'_' -f1)" = "001" ] && [ "$CORE_READY" = "1" ]; then echo "Skipping $f (already initialized)"; continue; fi; echo "Running $f"; psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 "$DB" -f "$f"; done

author: Quinn O'Donnell & Oneiro
